text: For each project, GS Construction Mountain, LLC management identifies applicable guidelines and assesses physical and chemical hazards to ensure that any potential hazards that may be created will be properly controlled. This assessment includes such factors as possible confined space use, ventilation availability, and nearby work activities that may affect or be affected by the use of the chemical.  At  this  time,  management  determines  the  appropriate  engineering  controls,  work practices, personal protective equipment, and fire control procedures.
